Actions.Text: REFERRED TO HOUSING, CONSTRUCTION AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT

Title: Provides for including siblings of parents and children of siblings in the definition of "family member" in relation to regulations pertaining to rights of family members
Summary: Provides for including siblings of parents and children of siblings in the definition of "family member" in relation to regulations pertaining to rights of family members to succeed in certain cases to the rights of certain tenants.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public housing law, in relation to the definition of "family member"
